HomeImpactExpansion

Regional Expansion

Growing our reach across Eastern Uganda and beyond.

Growing Our Reach

From Bugwere to Beyond

What began as a focused initiative in the Bugwere region is now expanding across Eastern Uganda. Our proven model of end-to-end agricultural support is scalable and replicable, allowing us to bring the same transformative impact to new communities.

Active

Bugwere Region

Households: 8,200+Parishes: 28
Expanding

Budaka District

Households: 1,200+Parishes: 6
New

Pallisa District

Households: 500+Parishes: 3
Planning

Tororo District
